notes: Self-healing media drive: when a node's Z: mapping dies (Windows drops mapped drives on idle), the node now re-maps it automatically and resumes claiming jobs on its own — and the dashboard shows a red 'MEDIA DRIVE OFFLINE' badge on that node while it's down, so an idle node is never a mystery again. Plus v2.24's replace-on-accept flow, node tags on active jobs, and live worker scaling.
